parameters.query:
=-- UC1: Dormant leads never contacted
SELECT id, name, email, company, role, industry, company_size, notes, score, routing, last_activity_at, created_at
FROM leads
WHERE tenant_id = '{{$env.TENANT_ID}}'
  AND status = 'new'
  AND (last_activity_at IS NULL OR last_activity_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
  AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 50;

=-- UC2: Post-demo leads with no follow-up
SELECT l.id, l.name, l.email, l.company, l.role, l.industry, l.company_size, l.notes, l.score,
       l.routing, l.last_activity_at
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN emails_sent e ON e.lead_id = l.id AND e.tenant_id = l.tenant_id
WHERE l.tenant_id = '{{$env.TENANT_ID}}'
  AND l.status IN ('new', 'contacted')
  AND (l.last_activity_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' OR l.last_activity_at IS NULL)
  AND e.id IS NULL
ORDER BY l.score DESC
LIMIT 50;
=SELECT content, metadata FROM memory_chunks WHERE tenant_id = '{{$env.TENANT_ID}}' AND metadata->>'type' = 'successful_email' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;

parameters.columns: tenant_id, agent, rec_type, data, priority, status
tenant_id, agent, rec_type, data, priority, status

meta.description: UC1-UC4: detect dormant/post-demo leads, score, generate email, validate, route to approval or auto-send.
